name: Harvest Pumpkin Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a 15x10-1/2 inch jelly roll pan with foil and grease generously.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg yolks on medium speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes.
4. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating for 2 additional minutes.
5. Stir together flour, cocoa, 1/4 cup sugar, baking soda, and salt; add to yolk mixture alternately with water, beating just until batter is smooth.
6. Stir in vanilla extract; set aside.
7. In a small mixing bowl, beat egg whites on medium speed until soft peaks form. Gradually add remaining 1 tablespoon sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture until well combined.
9. Spread batter evenly into prepared pan and bake for 14 to 16 minutes or until the top springs back when touched lightly.
10. Immediately loosen the cake from the edges of the pan; invert onto a clean, slightly dampened towel.
11. Carefully peel off the foil and cool completely.
PUMPKIN FILLING:
1. In a small saucepan, combine pumpkin and flour; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils (the mixture will be very thick).
2. Remove from heat and set aside.
CHOCOLATE GLAZE:
1. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt butter and shortening until creamy.
2. Add spices and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until light.
4. Slowly blend in the pumpkin mixture.
5. Remove from heat; gradually add vanilla extract, beating with a whisk until smooth.
Garnish with almonds if desired. Refrigerate leftovers. Serves 8 to 10.
